requirement_topic.en: Horizontal Battery Regulation / EPR — Botswana position
requirement_topic.zh: 横向电池法规/生产者责任——博茨瓦纳现状
requirement_topic.zht: 橫向電池法規/生產者責任——波札那現狀

summary.en: Botswana does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal battery regulation comparable to Regulation （EU） 2023/1542. There is no national battery passport, carbon-footprint declaration, recycled-content threshold, or extended-producer-responsibility （EPR） registration scheme specific to lithium batteries placed on the Botswana market. Instead, batteries and battery-powered products are governed through general product-conformity controls administered by the Botswana Bureau of Standards （BOBS）, where the product falls within a compulsory standards specification, plus general environmental and waste rules administered by the Department of Waste Management and Pollution Control. Exporters should treat battery-specific obligations as conformity-driven （BOS standards/IEC safety） rather than as a dedicated battery-lifecycle regime.
summary.zh: 博茨瓦纳没有类似法规（EU）2023/1542的欧盟式横向电池法规。针对投放博茨瓦纳市场的锂电池，不存在国家电池护照、碳足迹声明、再生材料含量门槛或专门的延伸生产者责任（EPR）注册制度。电池及电池供电产品主要通过博茨瓦纳标准局（BOBS）实施的一般产品合格评定管制（在产品属于强制标准规范范围时），以及废物管理与污染控制部门实施的一般环境和废物规则进行管理。出口商应将电池相关义务视为以合格评定为导向（BOS标准/IEC安全），而非专门的电池全生命周期制度。
summary.zht: 波札那沒有類似法規（EU）2023/1542的歐盟式橫向電池法規。針對投放波札那市場的鋰電池，不存在國家電池護照、碳足跡聲明、再生材料含量門檻或專門的延伸生產者責任（EPR）登記制度。電池及電池供電產品主要透過波札那標準局（BOBS）實施的一般產品合格評定管制（在產品屬於強制標準規範範圍時），以及廢物管理與污染控制部門實施的一般環境和廢物規則進行管理。出口商應將電池相關義務視為以合格評定為導向（BOS標準/IEC安全），而非專門的電池全生命週期制度。

standards_or_laws: Standards Act (Botswana) — BOBS compulsory standards specifications framework
Waste Management Act (Botswana) — general waste and environmental controls
No EU-style horizontal battery regulation equivalent to Regulation (EU) 2023/1542

summary.en: China regulates batteries through product safety standards （GB 31241-2022 for portable lithium cells and packs） and CCC where the host product is in the CCC catalogue, plus separate environmental/recycling rules for spent power batteries. China has no single horizontal battery regulation mirroring EU 2023/1542 either; its controls are likewise standards-and-catalogue driven. A Chinese GB 31241 report or CCC certificate addresses product safety, not a Botswana-facing lifecycle or EPR obligation （because none of that kind exists in Botswana）.
summary.zh: 中国通过产品安全标准（便携式锂电芯及电池组的GB 31241-2022）以及主机产品属CCC目录时的CCC认证进行管理，并对废动力电池设有单独的环境/回收规则。中国同样没有对标EU 2023/1542的单一横向电池法规，其管制亦以标准和目录为导向。中国GB 31241报告或CCC证书针对产品安全，而非面向博茨瓦纳的生命周期或EPR义务（因为博茨瓦纳并不存在此类制度）。
summary.zht: 中國透過產品安全標準（便攜式鋰電芯及電池組的GB 31241-2022）以及主機產品屬CCC目錄時的CCC認證進行管理，並對廢動力電池設有單獨的環境/回收規則。中國同樣沒有對標EU 2023/1542的單一橫向電池法規，其管制亦以標準和目錄為導向。中國GB 31241報告或CCC證書針對產品安全，而非面向波札那的生命週期或EPR義務（因為波札那並不存在此類制度）。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — applies to host product where catalogue-listed

gap.en: The practical gap is the reverse of the EU case: Botswana imposes NO battery passport, carbon-footprint, recycled-content, or EPR registration duty, so exporters do not need to build that EU-specific evidence for Botswana. The real obligations are product-conformity (BOBS / BOS standards, IEC safety) and import controls covered in the other rows. Exporters should confirm with BOBS whether their specific battery or battery-powered product falls under a compulsory standards specification, and check general waste/environmental rules for disposal and labelling, rather than assume an EU-style lifecycle regime applies.
gap.zh: 实际差距与欧盟情况相反：博茨瓦纳不设电池护照、碳足迹、再生材料含量或EPR注册义务，因此出口商无需为博茨瓦纳建立此类欧盟专属证据。真正的义务在于产品合格评定（BOBS/BOS标准、IEC安全）和进口管制，详见其他行。出口商应向BOBS确认其具体电池或电池供电产品是否属于强制标准规范范围，并核查关于处置和标签的一般废物/环境规则，而非假设适用欧盟式生命周期制度。
gap.zht: 實際差距與歐盟情況相反：波札那不設電池護照、碳足跡、再生材料含量或EPR登記義務，因此出口商無需為波札那建立此類歐盟專屬證據。真正的義務在於產品合格評定（BOBS/BOS標準、IEC安全）和進口管制，詳見其他行。出口商應向BOBS確認其具體電池或電池供電產品是否屬於強制標準規範範圍，並核查關於處置和標籤的一般廢物/環境規則，而非假設適用歐盟式生命週期制度。

mandatory_status.target: No dedicated battery-lifecycle/EPR regime — battery obligations are conformity-driven via BOBS compulsory specifications where in scope; general waste/environmental law applies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory product-safety standard (GB 31241-2022) for domestic market; no EU-style horizontal battery regulation in China either

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Botswana has no EU-style horizontal battery regulation, EPR registration, or battery-passport obligation, so the dominant requirements for lithium batteries and power banks are product conformity (BOBS/BOS standards, IEC safety), radio type approval for wireless features, transport testing, and the importer pathway. Chinese GB 31241 or CCC documentation addresses safety but does not by itself complete a Botswana market-access file; exporters should confirm BOBS scope and route directly.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 博茨瓦纳没有欧盟式的横向电池法规、EPR注册或电池护照义务，因此锂电池和移动电源的主要要求是产品合格评定（BOBS/BOS标准、IEC安全）、无线功能的无线电型号核准、运输测试及进口商路径。中国GB 31241或CCC文件针对安全，但本身不能完成博茨瓦纳市场准入文件；出口商应直接向BOBS确认管制范围与路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 波札那沒有歐盟式的橫向電池法規、EPR登記或電池護照義務，因此鋰電池和行動電源的主要要求是產品合格評定（BOBS/BOS標準、IEC安全）、無線功能的無線電型號核准、運輸測試及進口商路徑。中國GB 31241或CCC文件針對安全，但本身不能完成波札那市場准入文件；出口商應直接向BOBS確認管制範圍與路徑。
